ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the neighborhood is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count of the neighborhood */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the neighborhood */,
  "average_house_price" INTEGER /* Average house price in the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the neighborhood record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the neighborhood record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough FOREIGN KEY ("borough") REFERENCES boroughs ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count of the borough */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the borough */,
  "average_house_price" INTEGER /* Average house price in the borough */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the borough record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the borough record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code */,
  "code" TEXT /* The postal code */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the postal code belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count of the postal code area */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the postal code area in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the postal code area */,
  "average_house_price" INTEGER /* Average house price in the postal code area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the postal code record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the postal code record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_codes_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_boroughs" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id", "borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_locations" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "map_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the map */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the map was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the map was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
